name: python3-pyregfi
title: python3-pyregfi
description:
Python 3 Bindings for reglookup
This package contains Python 3 bindings to libregfi. There are the low-level
data structures for winsec library and C API mappings for  accessing
registry data structures.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyregfi because Python 3 Bindings for reglookup.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyregfi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyregfi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyregfi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
